name: Italian Zucchini Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice zucchini into 1/2 inch pieces and drop into boiling water. Cook for 4-5 minutes and drain.
2. Place the cooked zucchini in a casserole dish.
3. In a separate pan, sauté onion and green pepper in margarine until softened.
4. Add spaghetti sauce mix, shredded cheddar cheese, mushroom pieces, tomato paste, and water to the pan. Stir well to combine.
5. Pour the mixture over the zucchini in the casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top of the casserole.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes at 350°F, or microwave for 13 minutes on HIGH; turn once. Let stand for 5-10 minutes before serving.
